hooks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "& { if (Test-Path 'graphify-out/graph.json') { @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';additionalContext='graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files.'}} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 3 } }"
